generation.chat.title: Generated chat title.
generation.story.opening_scenario: 1–3 short paragraphs in second-person present tense. Separate paragraphs with two line breaks.
generation.story.pregen_npcs: List of pre-generated NPCs with full details. All named/identified characters appear with full names, no player/placeholders, add only if strongly implied, not at player's start unless stated.
generation.story.starting_date: Starting date string in YYYY-MM-DD format (zero-padded month/day). It should be appropriate for the story's time setting.
generation.story.starting_location: 1–5 word unique location name: specific named place, not generic. Use possessive/numbers if needed. No vague terms (unknown, adjacent, nearby).
generation.story.starting_time: Starting time string in 24h HH:MM format (00–23:00–59, zero-padded). It should be in line with the opening scenario.
generation.story.title: 3–5 word title tied to the opening scenario.
llm.npc_update.current_location: Current unique location name. Describes concrete room. Update only when changed. Should be precise. Avoid `her house`, instead do `{name}'s bathroom`
llm.npc_update.entry: NPC update object. Required: name. Also include at least one changed field (race, gender, current_location, current_appearance, current_clothing, or current_activity).
llm.npc_update.name: Existing NPC name to update (must exactly match a tracked NPC name).
llm.npc_update.current_activity: Concise, factual description of what the character is doing right now. Make sure to update even for background characters.
llm.turn_response.narrative_text: 1–3 short paragraphs in second-person present tense. Separate paragraphs with two line breaks.
llm.turn_response.background_events: Optional hidden off-screen events happening in parallel to the player-facing narrative. Include information the player character does not know. Never describe events happening to the player character here, and never repeat events already stated in narrative_text. 1–3 short paragraphs; separate with the literal sequence \n\n. Omit if nothing significant happens.
llm.turn_response.npc_changes: Optional array of updates for existing NPCs whose state changed this turn. Each entry must include name and exactly one changed field. Keep this field at the root (do not nest under world_state_update). Omit if no NPC states changed.
llm.turn_response.npc_introductions: Optional array of newly introduced NPCs with full details. Omit if there are no new NPCs. Never reintroduce NPCs that are already tracked. Keep this field at the root (do not nest under world_state_update).
llm.turn_response.current_inventory: Optional complete, updated inventory array (not a diff). Each item must include name and description. Omit if inventory did not change.
llm.turn_response.world_state_update: Always include this object. Use {} if nothing changed. Otherwise include only changed fields (current_scene, time_of_day, and locations if enabled). Do not nest npc_changes, npc_introductions, or background_events inside this object.
llm.world_state_update.current_scene: Updated unique 1–5 word name of the player's immediate location. Include only when it changed.
llm.world_state_update.locations: Optional array of location objects to add/update. Include newly discovered or changed locations only. Location names must be unique (case-insensitive).
llm.world_state_update.memory: Running summary of key events and important facts.
llm.world_state_update.time_of_day: 24-hour HH:MM time string of when events took place (00–23:00–59, zero-padded).
state.character.baseline_appearance: Generate a comprehensive baseline appearance description covering the following domains in order: (1) overall proportions and frame — height estimate, build type, limb-to-torso and shoulder-to-hip ratios; (2) skin — undertone, depth, texture, and all permanent markings such as moles, birthmarks, scars, and hyperpigmentation with exact anatomical location and size; (3) facial geometry — skull and face shape, thirds balance, symmetry, and per-feature breakdown of eyes (shape, set, iris color, lid structure), nose (bridge profile, tip, nostrils), mouth (lip ratio, commissure angle at rest), jaw, and chin; (4) head attachments — ear size, protrusion, and lobe type; neck length and width; (5) body structure — shoulder shape, chest and rib cage, waist definition, spinal curvature tendency, hip-to-shoulder ratio, glute projection, and thigh contact pattern; (6) extremities — arm musculature at rest, carrying angle, hand size and vein visibility, calf shape, ankle definition, foot arch, and toe length pattern; (7) genitalia — anatomical configuration, size and proportion relative to body, skin tone consistency or variation, symmetry, permanent structural features, and any permanent surface markings. Include only permanent or structurally fixed traits — exclude all grooming, styling, clothing, applied cosmetics, temporary skin states, and expression. Write in tight, third-person clinical prose with no aesthetic judgment, no hedging unless genuinely ambiguous, and no filler.
state.character.current_activity: Concise, factual description of what the character is doing right now. Make sure to update even for background characters.
state.character.current_appearance: Generate a comprehensive current appearance description covering the following domains in order, mirroring baseline structure for direct comparison: (1) overall proportions and frame — observed height, current build and weight distribution, any postural deviations from neutral; (2) skin — current tone and condition, active temporary markings such as bruises, tan lines, redness, blemishes, or swelling, and any changes to known permanent markings; (3) facial geometry — current expression at rest, any visible puffiness or volume shifts, and per-feature state of eyes (current iris appearance, redness, puffiness, under-eye condition), nose, mouth (current lip condition, color), jaw, and chin; (4) head attachments — current hair length, color, texture, and style; facial hair presence, length, and distribution; ear adornments; (5) body structure — current visible muscle tone and fat distribution, any visible asymmetry from injury or strain, current breast or chest state; (6) extremities — current nail length and condition, skin condition of hands and feet, any visible swelling or injury; (7) genitalia — current state including any transient changes in color, swelling, or condition relative to baseline. Also capture: current grooming state (body hair coverage and distribution), applied products visible on skin, and any worn adornments that alter perceived silhouette. Write in tight, third-person clinical prose with no aesthetic judgment, no hedging unless genuinely ambiguous, and no filler.
state.character.current_clothing: Precise objective surgical-style exhaustive catalog of all current clothing layers (outerwear/underwear/accessories/medical dressings/bandages). Should contains only clothing description. Omit field entirely if unchanged; never output 'None'.
state.character.current_location: Current unique location name. Should be precise and concise. 1-5 words.
state.character.gender: Character gender (male, female, futanari, intersex and so on).
state.character.general_description: Generate a comprehensive baseline character profile covering the following domains in order: (1) identity fundamentals — full name, age, biological sex, gender identity, nationality, ethnicity, and native language(s); (2) personality core — dominant and secondary traits, default emotional register, stress response pattern, decision-making style (impulsive vs. deliberate, emotional vs. rational), and moral framework; (3) social behavior — communication style, role in group dynamics (leader, mediator, follower, outlier), trust disposition, conflict approach, and attachment style in close relationships; (4) background — socioeconomic origin, family structure and key relationships, formative experiences that durably shaped worldview or behavior, education level and type, and current life circumstances; (5) skills, competencies, and knowledge domains — both trained and natural, including physical, intellectual, social, and practical; (6) beliefs and worldview — political and philosophical leanings, religious or spiritual stance, core values, and any strong biases or blind spots; (7) motivations and drives — primary long-term goal, underlying psychological need driving it, and the main internal or external obstacle standing in the way. Include only stable, durable traits — exclude current mood, temporary circumstances, or situation-specific behavior unless it reflects a permanent pattern. Write in tight, third-person prose with no filler, no vague generalizations, and enough specificity that two different readers would picture the same person.
state.character.name: Full legal name.
state.inventory_item.entry: Inventory item object. Required: name (string) and description (string).
state.inventory_item.name: Item name (short noun phrase).
state.location.available_item: Available item object in a location. Required: name (string) and description (string).
state.location.available_items: List of items available to use or take in this location.
state.location.character: Character name string present in this location (full name; no duplicates).
state.location.characters: List of character name strings currently in this location.
state.location.description: Very short description of how the location looks. Don't mention characters in room.
state.location.entry: Location object. Required: name (string), description (string), characters (array of strings), available_items (array of item objects with name and description).
state.location.name: Unique location name. Describes concrete room. Update only when changed. Should be precise. Avoid `her house`, instead do `{surname}'s bathroom`
story_modules.character_appearance_cloth: Whether to include player appearance and clothing fields.
story_modules.character_major_flaws: Whether to include player major flaws.
story_modules.character_personality_trai: Whether to include player personality traits.
story_modules.npc_appearance_clothing: Whether to include NPC appearance and clothing fields.
story_modules.npc_major_flaws: Whether to include NPC major flaws.
story_modules.npc_personality_traits: Whether to include NPC personality traits.
story_modules.track_background_events: Whether to generate optional hidden background events per turn.
story_modules.track_locations: Whether to track locations list and presence.
story_modules.track_npcs: Whether to track NPC state and updates.
traits.entry: Trait entry string: 1–8 words; no full sentences.
traits.major_flaws: List of major flaws describing significant, enduring weaknesses or liabilities. Each entry is a significant, enduring weakness or liability of 1-8 words.
traits.perks: List of perks describing practical advantages, talents, or resources. Each entry is a concrete advantage, talent, or resource of 1-8 words.
traits.personality_traits: List of personality traits describing stable temperament and behavior. Each entry is a concise temperament or behavior descriptor of 1-8 words.
traits.quirks: List of quirks describing small, idiosyncratic habits or mannerisms. Each entry is a small, specific habit or mannerism of 1-8 words.
